MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c AS UnifiedIndividualId__c, APPROX_COUNT_DISTINCT(ssot__Case__dlm.ssot__Id__c) AS CaseCount__c, max(ssot__Case__dlm.ssot__CreatedDate__c) AS LastCaseDate__c FROM ssot__Case__dlm JOIN UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm ON UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__Case__dlm.ssot__IndividualId__c OR UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__Case__dlm.ssot__AccountId__c GROUP BY UnifiedLinkssotIndividualCoff__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c
